description: Approved title template variants by archetype. NOT yet consumed by page generation — activate_when title_pattern_weights moves to ACTIVE in learning-scope.json.
activate_when: Title selection logic is added to lib/lane-page-schema.js → buildCanonicalLanePageData()

default.notes: Current production template. Origin/dest are full city names.

cost_lead.notes: Leads with cost intent signal for transactional queries.

route_lead.notes: Leads with route for navigational/geographic queries.

service_lead.notes: Leads with service framing for brand+service queries.
